channel.title: Persona Lens — Guides
channel.description: Long-form guides on the patterns that shape every relationship in your life. Built by Persona Lens — an iOS app for behaviour-based personality analysis.

item.title: How to recognise gaslighting in text messages
item.description: Long-form guide from Persona Lens — a structured read on a specific relationship pattern. Read at https://persona-lens.com/guides/gaslighting-signs-in-texts.html
